chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 75 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 18.12.2023 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
